prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your first serious relationship forward
items: Have an honest conversation with your partner about your relationship goals, timeline expectations, and core values
Create a shared digital calendar or planner to coordinate schedules and plan regular date nights together
Schedule and attend a couples communication workshop or download a relationship communication app to practice together
Research and create a shared list of relationship boundaries and expectations for social media, friendships, and personal space
Create individual lists of your family traditions, values, and relationship history to share and discuss with your partner
